title: XaerosShinyCobblemon
body:
***All shiny pokemons now have a orange glow for easier spotting.***
-

The following below is outdated.
- ``` Includes all the original cobblemons v1.3 Includes MysticMons v1.6 Includes AlolaMons v1.3* Includes DecubeMons v1.5.1 Includes MoreMons v0.4.1 ``` For AlolaMons to work right I've added the edited files separately just drag and drop or edit them yourself. ``` Extract the AlolaMonsFix.zip Extract AlolaMons_v1.3.zip Then navigate the following: AlolaMons_v1.3/assets/cobblemon/bedrock/species/ ``` --- if you decide to edit them yourself look for this in the .json files: "aspects": [ "shiny" ], "texture": "cobblemon:textures/pokemon/charjabug/charjabug.png" Just add _shiny to the end of the name like this: "aspects": [ "shiny" ], "texture": "cobblemon:textures/pokemon/charjabug/charjabug_shiny.png" save then rinse and repeat for all of them.
Once your done with that rezip everything with winrar or 7zip --- ***Huge thanks to the following people***
***MBCMechachu*** for the [National Pokedex - Icon Dex](https://www.deviantart.com/mbcmechachu/art/National-Pokedex-Icon-Dex-824897934)
***Accieo*** for the sprites used in his pack [xaeroscobblemon](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xaeroscobblemon)
***Maxitotito*** for the idea [maxis-journeymap-cobblemon-icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/maxis-journeymap-cobblemon-icons)
